title: Mythicblades
description: My project is about an minecraft plugin that allows players to craft 4 custom blades that have custom abilities ranging from invulnerability to flying tridents around you, The plugin is made for SMP's if someone wants, Its free to use but credit me !
body:
[Soul system](https://modrinth.com/plugin/soul-system)
**NOT / REQUIRED TO CRAFT THE BLADES **


[Texture pack](https://mega.nz/file/hyMhgQCI#7AeoXaQjWzNeQ9Vwavblf5s6qg-TmqUFFDulAIiADi8)
**REQUIRED TO SEE THE TEXTURES FOR THE BLADES**

[Check out MYTHICWEAPONS](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mythic-weapons)

## **Failing to give credit for using the plugin on a social network video or anything similar, will force me to ask the credit being given, and in other forms i have to strike the video down, as license is for me.**

Minecraft 1.21 Plugin Description: Custom Swords & King’s Crown

Introducing a new Minecraft 1.21 plugin tailored for those looking to add excitement and unique gameplay mechanics to their custom SMP server. This plugin features four custom swords and a King’s Crown, each with game-changing abilities designed to enhance PvP, exploration, and overall server dynamics. Here's what you can expect:

Key Features:
Four Unique Custom Swords:

Swords abilities range from invulerability , freezing players , flying trident shield , true invis to many more.

[Abilities shown here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mythicblades/gallery)

Perfect for Custom SMP Servers:
This plugin is designed for creators looking to offer a unique experience on their SMP (Survival Multiplayer) servers. The custom abilities ensure dynamic combat and interactions that go beyond typical Minecraft gameplay, perfect for building out lore and custom events.

### CRAFTS

Soulblade
